# factorio-rs

> Write Factorio mods in Rust. factorio-rs transpiles a Factorio-oriented Rust subset to loadable Lua mods with typed API stubs, events, settings, locale, and transpile-time safety lints.

Docs: https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/
GitHub: https://github.com/languint/factorio-rs
crates.io: https://crates.io/crates/factorio-rs

## Start here

- [Introduction](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/intro/): What factorio-rs is and how it fits Factorio modding
- [Installation](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/installation/): Install the CLI and SDK
- [Getting started](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/getting-started/): init, build, and load a mod
- [First hour](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/recipes/first-hour/): First print and in-game test
- [Playground](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/playground/): Live browser transpile preview

## Guides

- [Supported Rust](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/language/)
- [Stages](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/stages/)
- [Events and filters](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/events/)
- [Testing](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/testing/)
- [Lints](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/lints/)
- [Sharing code between mods](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/dependencies/)
- [Prototypes](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/guides/prototypes/)

## Recipes and reference

- [Recipes](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/recipes/)
- [CLI](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/reference/cli/)
- [Factorio.toml](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/reference/factorio-toml/)
- [Macros and attributes](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/reference/macros/)

## Ecosystem

- [factorio-rs-gui](https://languint.github.io/factorio-rs/ecosystem/factorio-rs-gui/): Reactive GUI helpers for factorio-rs mods
